has_security_note.rubric: 'recap_text' includes a note or reminder that security-flagged PRs were skipped and still need manual/human review. Answer yes only if such an advisory is actually present in the text.

has_maintainer_court_note.rubric: 'recap_text' includes a reminder that maintainer-court PRs (those skipped because the author is awaiting a maintainer response) still need a maintainer to respond. Answer yes only if such a reminder is actually present in the text.

has_bare_pr_ref.rubric: 'recap_text' contains a bare PR reference: a #NNN token that is NOT wrapped in a markdown link ([#NNN](url)) AND NOT wrapped in an OSC 8 terminal hyperlink escape sequence. A #NNN inside either wrapper form, or a plain URL, does NOT count as bare. Answer yes only if at least one genuinely unwrapped #NNN appears in the text.
